nodes.label: App Boundaries and Runtime Shape
nodes.rationale: Root app is the local-first desktop product (Electron → standalone Next → api routes → server/native); apps/landing is the only Vercel-deployed app. No Nest service exists — do not add one until Next API routes can't handle a hosted-backend need cleanly. Keeps the repo organized without a risky rewrite while W5 is active.

nodes.label: Source Directory Rules
nodes.rationale: app/api is a thin HTTP boundary; features hold user-facing product areas; lib holds pure shared domain logic; server holds server-only native work. Keep the visible app focused on Home → Learn → Discover → Study → Correct until W5 decides the next direction.
